microphone_permission_denied: Microphone permission is needed to record.
no_recording_preview: Record a voice note to preview it here.
backend_offline: Backend is offline. Please check your PC server.
try_again_hint: Your voice note is still here. Try uploading it again.
home_job_failed_hint: This note did not finish processing. Open it for details or delete it and try again from Record.
job_stuck_hint: This note is taking too long to process. Try processing it again.
processing_failed_hint: This note did not finish processing. You can try again from Home or upload this recording again.
processing_timeout: This note is still processing. Check Home in a moment or try again if it gets stuck.
retry_note_failed: Could not retry this note. Please check the backend and try again.
no_audio: No audio is available for this note.
recent_notes_hint: Recent temporary voice notes will appear here.
first_note_hint: Record your first voice note to create a transcript and summary.
recording_placeholder: Recording controls will be connected in the voice recording phase.
processing_hint: Your transcript and summary will appear when the backend finishes.
result_placeholder: Processed note output will appear here after upload.
privacy_24h: Audio, transcripts, and summaries auto-delete after 24 hours.
